notableEvents.label: Andy Pages GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Andy Pages grounds into a double play, pitcher Matthew Liberatore to second baseman JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Alec Burleson. Teoscar Hernández out at 2nd. Andy Pages out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Andy Pages rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Andy Pages grounds into a double play, pitcher Matthew Liberatore to second baseman JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Alec Burleson. Teoscar Hernández out at 2nd. Andy Pages out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Hyeseong Kim pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Hyeseong Kim pops out to shortstop Masyn Winn in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Jordan Walker doubles (6) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Teoscar Hernández. Iván Herrera scores. Alec Burleson scores. Jordan Walker to 3rd. Jordan Walker advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by left fielder Teoscar Hernández.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jordan Walker doubles (6) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Teoscar Hernández. Iván Herrera scores. Alec Burleson scores. Jordan Walker to 3rd. Jordan Walker advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by left fielder Teoscar Hernández.

notableEvents.label: Hyeseong Kim pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Hyeseong Kim doubles (3) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Nathan Church.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by catcher Will Smith on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Balk run(s)
notableEvents.detail: With Nolan Gorman batting, Iván Herrera scores on a balk. Jordan Walker advances to 3rd on a balk.
